title: Adventures In Create
description: This modpack is focuses on the Create mod and also performance.
body:
# The project is NOT abandoned.  Updates coming later in this year.




**Thanks for the 200+ downloads!**

**Want a modpack that focuses on the Create mod, includes performance mods and has a little
Doctor Who in it? Now Adventures In Create is here to bring you that experience!**

You can comment or send an isssue here: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScW4YqsE0EnGipcd7Q44RQwsUBrqyBpcSGIJlErQrvEbYSVHA/viewform?usp=dialog)

**-Explore and fight!**

Explore the dungeons that this world contains, explore the new planets, defeat new mobs and bosses!

**-Technology**

From waterwheels to reactors, you can develop energy production and drive the hightech machines too!

**-Decorations**

Decorate your base with new exciting blocks!

**-Doctor Who**

Craft a TARDIS, become a time lord and fly through time and space!
